summary: Anime merchandise store website for Anime_Vibe_PK with dark JJK-themed design, neon blue highlights, and mobile-friendly layout for Pakistani anime fans
architectural_notes: Dark background with neon blue highlights for JJK anime theme
Mobile-first responsive design targeting teens and anime fans
Grid layout for product display with image placeholders
Authentication required for admin panel access (Internet Identity integration)
Pre-order buttons use Instagram direct DM link format: https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk to open DM chat directly

existing_features.title: Create a homepage with dark background and neon blue highlights following a modern anime aesthetic inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen (JJK) theme for text styling and visual elements
Add site logo in the top-left corner of the header that displays 'Anime_Vibe_PK' branding
Add Instagram link button in the top-right corner of the header that links to instagram.com/anime_vibe_pk
Create a prominent banner on the homepage displaying the text 'Anime Merch Pakistan | Pre-Orders Open'
Create a Products page with a responsive grid layout displaying multiple product categories: pouches, keychains, stickers, posters, and additional anime merchandise products
Add image placeholders for each product in the grid with clear visual indication that images will be added later
Add a 'Pre-Order Now → DM on Instagram' button to each product that links to Instagram direct messages for anime_vibe_pk account
Create an About section with the text 'Your favorite anime merch in Pakistan, COD available nationwide.' highlighting cash-on-delivery availability
Create a footer containing Instagram link (instagram.com/anime_vibe_pk), WhatsApp link (92+ 3324566056), and email contact (anime_vibe_pk@gmail.com)
Ensure the entire website is fully responsive and mobile-friendly with optimized layout and navigation for smartphone users
Design the site to be visually appealing for the target audience of teenagers and anime fans with modern, engaging aesthetics
Remove the WhatsApp link and phone number (92+ 3324566056) from the footer component while keeping the Instagram and email contact links intact
Replace the placeholder image for the 'JJK Theme Pouch' product with the uploaded JJK-themed pouch image (3c8e50aa6b3810d598ea8ec5f2b813f5.jpg) showing characters from Jujutsu Kaisen

Replace the placeholder image for the 'Demon Slayer Theme Pouch' product with the uploaded Demon Slayer-themed pouch image (327a80c118bf4feaa8702364a5017fa4.jpg) showing multiple colored pouches with Demon Slayer patterns

Replace the placeholder image for the 'All Anime Characters Theme Pouch' product with the uploaded multi-anime collage image (585f1ded22dad1bdd1a9f13ced0b702b.jpg) featuring various popular anime series including Death Note, Attack on Titan, My Hero Academia, and others

Replace the placeholder image for the 'Chibi Demon Slayer Keychain' product with the uploaded Demon Slayer chibi keychain image (b1194f1e07cf7f6bb89056cf9f1eef1d.jpg) showing chibi-style characters from Demon Slayer anime

Replace the placeholder image for the 'One Piece Keychain' product with the uploaded One Piece keychain image (fcee77a403ba41775fdc8b85478df166.jpg) showing One Piece characters in glitter-filled acrylic keychain format

Replace the placeholder image for the 'Gojo Keychain' product with the uploaded Gojo keychain image (caa641eda83b7207075a7845a9ae0aff.jpg) showing Satoru Gojo from Jujutsu Kaisen in black and white acrylic keychain format

Replace the placeholder image for the 'Naruto Keychain' product with the uploaded Naruto keychain image (0ed10b831c72d24125ca1033d566370b.jpg) showing 3D figurine-style Naruto characters on circular bases
Create an admin interface in the frontend with a form to add new products including fields for product name, category selection dropdown, price, and image URL
Update ProductsPage to fetch products dynamically from the backend instead of using hardcoded static data
Add category filter navigation to ProductsPage allowing users to view all products or filter by specific category (pouches, keychains, stickers, posters, other)
Ensure each product card displays the 'Pre-Order Now → DM on Instagram' button that links to Instagram direct messages for the anime_vibe_pk account
Implement Internet Identity authentication for the admin panel so only authenticated users can access the product creation interface
Add a login/logout UI component in the admin panel that displays the authentication status and provides login/logout actions using Internet Identity

Update the 'Pre-Order Now → DM on Instagram' button in ProductCard.tsx to link directly to the Instagram DM conversation for anime_vibe_pk using the URL https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk instead of the profile page, so tapping the button instantly opens the DM chat.

new_feature_requests.summary: Homepage with logo, Instagram link, and banner
Products grid page with placeholders for pouches, keychains, stickers, posters and more
Pre-order buttons linking to Instagram DM for each product
About section highlighting COD availability nationwide in Pakistan
Footer with Instagram, WhatsApp links and contact information
Allow adding multiple products within categories with DM pre-order option
Create a backend data model for products with fields: id, name, category, price, imageUrl, and createdAt timestamp
Implement backend functions to create new products with category assignment (pouches, keychains, stickers, posters, and other merchandise categories)
Implement backend functions to retrieve all products and filter products by category
Create backend migration logic to preserve existing product data during canister upgrades using stable storage
Add authentication to admin panel so only authorized users can access it
Create documentation in a README.md file explaining how to publish the app to the Internet Computer network and make it publicly accessible with a production URL
Update 'DM on Instagram' pre-order buttons to directly open Instagram DM chat instead of just the profile page
